SwapQueueModal.pickCourt: Pick a court to swap with
SwapQueueModal.title: Swap queues
SwapQueueModal.intro: Pick multiple on each side, or just one side (to simply move people over). After swapping, each court's queue holds at most {{cap}}.
SwapQueueModal.noQueueSource: No one in queue (you can still bring players from another court)
SwapQueueModal.overWarning: This swap would push {{courts}} over the {{cap}}-person queue limit — adjust the numbers on both sides
